title: Rose Quartz Compat
description: Makes Biomes O' Plenty's rose quartz compatible with create mod
body:
You can now use sandpaper on a rose quartz chunk to get normal rose quartz from Create.

(Reason: BOP's Rose Quartz is a bit more "chunkier")

 

v1.1: now with crushng recipes - see update log

 

NOTE: Both the Create Mod and Biomes O' Plenty mod are necessary for this mod to work!
